title: User Login Successful with Correct Credentials
description: Verify that a user can successfully log in using valid email and password credentials with session persistence.

steps.description: Open the login page.
Enter valid registered email and password.
Submit the login form.
Confirm login is successful and user is redirected to the dashboard.
Verify that session persistence is enabled by refreshing the page and ensuring user remains logged in.

title: User Login Fails with Incorrect Credentials
description: Verify that login fails and appropriate error messages appear when user enters invalid credentials.

steps.description: Open the login page.
Enter invalid email or password.
Submit the login form.
Confirm login is rejected and an error message is displayed in Spanish indicating authentication failure.
Verify user remains on the login page without session creation.

title: Dashboard Displays Correct KPI Metrics After Login
description: Validate that upon successful login the dashboard shows accurate counts for organizations, projects, and WBS nodes relating to the user.

steps.description: Login with valid credentials.
Confirm the dashboard loads without errors.
Verify KPI cards display counts for organizations, projects, and WBS nodes corresponding to the user's accessible data.

title: WBS Tree Structure Renders Correctly with Hierarchy and Child Counts
description: Verify that the Work Breakdown Structure tree component recursively displays the hierarchical nodes with proper indentation, codes, and child count labels.

steps.description: Access dashboard with multiple projects and WBS nodes.
Confirm WBS tree is rendered and displays parent and child nodes correctly with indentation.
Verify that each node shows appropriate code labels and number of child nodes.

title: Row-Level Security Enforcement Blocks Unauthorized Data Access
description: Validate that users can only access organizations, projects, and WBS nodes associated with their organization, and that unauthorized access attempts are rejected.

steps.description: Login as a user assigned to Organization A.
Attempt to access data of Organization B directly via API or queries.
Verify that the system blocks access and returns no data or access denied error.
Confirm user only sees data from assigned organization in UI components.

title: Idempotent Database Seeding Creates Demo Data Without Duplication
description: Verify that running the seeding process multiple times results in no duplicate entries in the demo organization, project, and WBS nodes.

steps.description: Trigger the seeding function to create demo data.
Confirm demo organization, project, and WBS nodes exist in the database after first seed.
Trigger the seeding function again without any database cleanup.
Verify no duplicate entries are created; counts of demo records remain the same.
Check emitted signals (TESTSPRITE_SIGNAL, TEST_STATUS, TESTSPRITE_CONTROL, STATUS_SIGNAL) are consistent and expected.

title: Error Handling for Network or Backend Failures in Data Loading
description: Ensure the system shows user-friendly error messages in Spanish when the backend or network connection fails during loading organizations, projects, or WBS nodes.

steps.description: Simulate backend or network failure during data fetch after login.
Verify the dashboard displays an appropriate error message in Spanish explaining the failure.
Confirm the UI does not crash and allows user to retry or logout.

title: Supabase Client Connection Health Check
description: Verify that the Supabase client initializes correctly and connection test returns success status.

steps.description: Invoke the testConnection method on Supabase client.
Confirm that the connection test passes without errors.

title: Sign Out Successfully Ends Session and Redirects to Login
description: Test that user sign out function clears session and returns the user to the login page securely.

steps.description: Login with valid credentials.
Click sign out option.
Verify session is terminated and user is redirected to the login screen.
Attempt accessing protected routes redirects back to login.
